titleStmt.title: SII 16.266: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 266. (A.R. No. 163 of 1905.) MĀRKĀPUR, MARKAPUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall of the Lakshmīdēvi shrine in the Chennakēśava temple.

This is dated in Śaka 1489, Prabhava, Kārtika śu. 14 and the gift is said to have been made on the occasion of a lunar eclipse. Kārtika śu 14 of that year occured on October 17 and the tithi ended at °03 of the day. The lunar eclipse occured the next day. The date thus corresponds to 1567 A.D., October 17, (Friday).

It records a gift of half a gōcharma of dry land in the gift village Māreḷḷa in Addaṅkisīma, a marttu of wet land under the tank at Mārakāpuram, and specified quantities of the offerings in the temple as also the gifts (saṁbhāvana) made by the elders on the occasions of festivals for the purpose of reading the purāṇam in the presence of the god to Lakshmaṇayya of Hārīta-gōtra, Āpastaṁba-sūtra and Yajuś-śākha, son of Girayya and grandson of Parāṅkuśam Raṅgayya, by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Veṅkaṭayyadēva-mahārāja, of Ātrēya-gōtra, Āpastaṁba-sūtra and Yajuś-śākha, son of Tirumalayyadēva mahārāju and grandson of Āravīṭi Rāmarāju Śrīraṅgarājayyadēva-mahārāju.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrījayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1489 Agunēṭi prabhava saṁvvatsara kārttika śudda 14
lu śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīsadāsivadēvamahārāyalu ratna siṁhvāsanārūḍhulai
pṛthivisāṁmrājyaṁ śēyucuṁḍagānu Ātrēyagōtra Āpastaṁbasūtra yajuśśākhādhyāyu laina śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara Ārevī
ṭi rāmarāju śrīraṁgarājayya dēvamahārājuluṁgāri pautṛḷu tirumalarājayya dēvamahā rājuluṁgāri putrulaina veṁka
ṭayyadēvamahārājuluṁgāru . hāritagōtra Āpastaṁbasūtra yajuśśākhādhyāyulaina parānkuśaṁ raṁgayyagāri pautṛ
lai girayagāri putrulaina lakṣmaṇayyagāriki yicina dharmmaśāsanakramameṭlannanu māraka puraṁ ceṁnnarāyala saṁnidhi
ni mīru purāṇaṁ vinnapaṁcēsuka vuṁḍēṭaṁdulaku Adaṁkisīmalō ceṁnarāyalaku sāgivaccē māreḷlagrāmā
nanu Ardhagōcarmaṁ velipolamuṁnu mārakapuraṁ ceruvukiṁda martturu varinuḍiṁnni perumāḷḷakōvelanu dina
ṁ 1ki taḷigheḍu prasādamuṁnu tirupaṁṇirālu vagalu reṁḍēsiṁni caṁdanakāpu mōdalaina tirthaprasādālu
ṁnu tiruṇāḷḷa�ṁḍu Akkaḍi peddalalōbeṭṭu saṁbhāvanānu saṁdhividhi tirumāḷighānu Ivi Iṁnivaṭuṁnnu sō
mōparāga puṇyakālamaṁdu tripuruṣādēśaṁgānu trivācakaṁgānu sahiraṇyōdakadānadhārā pū
rvakaṁgānu Istimigāna mī putrapautrapāraṁparyaṁ Anubhaviṁci sukhulaivuṁḍuvāru .
svadattāṁ paradattaṁ vā yōharēta vasuṁdharāṁ [.] ṣaṣṭirvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimī .
śrīman mahāmaṁḍalēśvara rāmarāju śrīraṁgarājayadēvamahārājuluṁgāru mārakapuraṁ Adhikāri stānaṁvā
riki karaṇālakuṁ butteṁcina kāryaṁ veṁkaṭapati parāṁkuśaṁ lakṣmaṇayaṁgārni caṁnarāyala saṁnidhini purāṇaṁ
viṁnapaṁ cēsuka vuṁḍaṁgaṭṭaḍacēsi Aṁddulaku svāsthyaṁ yērparaci dānapatraṁ Icināṁḍēkāka Ā dānapatraprakā
rānanē mānyaṁ gaṭṭaḍa sēstimigāna Ā svāsthyaṁvāriki sāgiṁcēdi .
Digital edition of SII 16.266 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
